summary: Iteration 8 - UI/UX Redesign Testing. Tested all 5 redesigned pages: Sign In, Register, Forgot Password, Dashboard, and Profile. All pages load correctly with the new split-screen auth layout, sidebar-based dashboard, and clean profile editor. All form submissions work correctly.
passed_tests: SIGN IN PAGE:
✓ Split-screen layout loads correctly (image left, form right)
✓ Email input with Phosphor icon present
✓ Password input with show/hide toggle present
✓ Forgot password link present and navigates to /auth/forgot-password
✓ Create account link present and navigates to /auth/register
✓ Form submission works - redirects to /dashboard on success
✓ Cream background (#F5F3EE) applied correctly
✓ Playfair Display font used for heading
✓ Mobile responsive - collapses to form-only
REGISTER PAGE:
✓ Split-screen layout loads correctly
✓ Full Name, Email, Password fields present
✓ Password strength meter shows 4 criteria (8+ chars, Uppercase, Number, Special char)
✓ Strength meter shows red X for weak, green checkmarks for strong
✓ Form submission creates account and redirects to /dashboard
✓ Welcome toast shown after registration
✓ Mobile responsive - collapses to form-only
FORGOT PASSWORD PAGE:
✓ Split-screen layout loads correctly
✓ Email input present
✓ Send Reset Link button present
✓ Back to Sign In link present
✓ Form submission shows success state with green checkmark
✓ Success message: 'Check your email' displayed
✓ Mobile responsive - collapses to form-only
DASHBOARD PAGE:
✓ Sidebar navigation visible on lg+ screens
✓ Sidebar items: Explorer, Reservations, Guides certifies, Favoris, Messages
✓ Hero itinerary card with AI badge and CTA button
✓ 2x2 stat grid (24 guides, 12j avant voyage, 7 activites, 4.9 note)
✓ Guides list panel with 3 guides (Hassan M., Youssef B., Farid K.)
✓ Recommended itinerary panel (Jour 1, 2, 3)
✓ Upgrade plan button in top bar
✓ User avatar link to profile
✓ Sidebar navigation works: Explorer→/dashboard, Reservations→/itineraries, Guides→/map, Favoris→/destinations, Messages→/chat
PROFILE PAGE:
✓ Basic info section (Name, Phone, Bio, Language)
✓ Avatar color section with 10 color options
✓ Travel style section (Adventure, Cultural, Relaxation, Foodie, Photography, Budget)
✓ Interests section with 12 interest tags
✓ Save Profile button works
✓ Success toast 'Profile updated!' shown after save
✓ Changes persist after page reload
critical_code_review_comments: All 5 redesigned pages implemented correctly with new design system
Split-screen auth layout works well on desktop, collapses correctly on mobile
Framer Motion animations applied for smooth transitions
Playfair Display + Manrope fonts applied correctly
Cream background (#F5F3EE) consistent across all pages
Dashboard sidebar matches Madina wireframe design
All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user test_user_9358@example.com during registration testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 tested the UI/UX redesign of 5 pages: Sign In, Register, Forgot Password, Dashboard, and Profile. All pages use the new design system with Playfair Display + Manrope fonts, cream background (#F5F3EE), Phosphor icons, and Framer Motion animations. Auth pages have split-screen layout (image left, form right) that collapses to form-only on mobile. Dashboard has sidebar navigation matching Madina wireframe. All features working correctly.
